scripts.dev:all: concurrently "next dev -p 3000" "npm run dev --prefix apps/newsletter-generator" "npm run dev --prefix apps/cogpoker" "npm run dev --prefix apps/codeforge" "npm run dev --prefix apps/pdfforge" "npm run dev --prefix apps/lipi" "npm run dev:aileron"
scripts.dev:apps: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix apps/newsletter-generator" "npm run dev --prefix apps/cogpoker" "npm run dev --prefix apps/codeforge" "npm run dev --prefix apps/pdfforge" "npm run dev --prefix apps/lipi" "npm run dev:aileron"
scripts.docs:setup: cd docs-portal && python3 -m venv venv && ./venv/bin/pip install mkdocs mkdocs-material
